title: selaginella chuweimingii
intro: Selaginella chuweimingii, also known as the Chuweiming's spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Selaginella chuweimingii include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects, which can help to reduce swelling and lower body temperature. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or a decoction for consumption, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
